instruction: Navigate from the entrance to the first desk area in the open office.
Move through the open office and reach the meeting room table.
Walk through the entire office from the entrance to the end of the hallway.
Leave the meeting room and navigate to the back office desk.
Start near the first desk and navigate past the open office to the cabinet in the hallway.
Walk back from the end of the hallway to the office entrance.
